mapper.select: select order_id as orderId, product_id as productId, order_name as orderName, user_id as userId, create_time as createTime from t_business_order_info t where t.order_id = #{orderId}
select order_id as orderId, product_id as productId, order_name as orderName, user_id as userId, create_time as createTime from t_business_order_info t where instr(t.order_name, #{orderName}) > 0
mapper.insert: insert into t_business_order_info( order_id, product_id, order_name, user_id, create_time, update_time, remark ) values(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{orderName}, #{userId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark})
